title: pera leandrii var. genuina
intro: Pera leandrii var. genuina, also known as the Madagascar pera tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of pera leandrii var. genuina include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory infections, as well as having antioxidant and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of pera leandrii var. genuina include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are typically made from the leaves and bark of the tree.
